description: ChatGPT is OpenAI’s conversational AI product for chat, productivity, and coding workflows. The chatgpt.com site includes end-user product pages for ChatGPT features, apps, desktop, and Codex.
summary: chatgpt.com publicly exposes a ChatGPT/Codex product site and mentions one developer-callable surface on this domain: the Codex CLI package; no public HTTP API, GraphQL API, or MCP server on chatgpt.com itself was found.
